steps.title: Spot the shift from general principle to specific example
steps.content:
The first sentence makes a broad claim about energy transfer across trophic levels.

The second sentence immediately illustrates this principle with concrete examples: plants providing energy to herbivores, herbivores to carnivores, and so on.

The transition must signal that what follows demonstrates the general principle just stated.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
For example, directly signals that the following content illustrates the preceding claim.
The other three misfire: however and by contrast suggest contradiction that doesn't exist; likewise suggests a parallel statement rather than an example.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
